wafv2.webacl.managedrulegroupconfig.Logi.Docs: The path of the login endpoint for your application. For example, for the URL `https://example.com/web/login`, you would provide the path `/web/login`.

wafv2.webacl.managedrulegroupconfig.Pass.Docs: Details about your login page password field.

wafv2.webacl.managedrulegroupconfig.Payl.Docs: The payload type for your login endpoint, either JSON or form encoded.

wafv2.webacl.managedrulegroupconfig.User.Docs: Details about your login page username field.
